headline: This Week In Cloud AI - AMD and Microsoft Partner to Boost AI Infrastructure on Azure
summary: Recent developments in the field of Cloud AI include the strengthening of the strategic partnership between AMD and Microsoft, with a focus on deploying next-generation AI infrastructure via Microsoft Azure. As part of this collaboration, Microsoft will implement AMD's Helios Rackscale Solution to enhance AI model inference capabilities across its services and those of its customers. Additionally, Azure will introduce new VM series powered by AMD's latest EPYC processors and expand its...
